label: 1139_patrick honohan_honohan_patrick_bis patrick
label_human: Patrick honohan central bank of Ireland
description: Patrick Honohan, Governor of the Central Bank of Ireland, discussed financial sector developments, the impact of economic cycles on household wealth, and published annual reports during his tenure from 2010 to 2022.
